116 shopping lists / the lists / about / shop amazon

About

Hi, I’m Jim.

I like to shop. A lot. I also like to write and research and this is my little hobby site where I find the best selling items on Amazon, with a little help from AI.

This is really just a little experiment I have to see if I can’t make a few bucks and I think I will report here when the time comes on any/if money made. I expect this to be a long term project and as I am days into it-it should come as no surprise that this site gets very little traffic and I have an income so far of zero.

Is this a good idea? I have no idea but it keeps me out of trouble at night after my family goes to bed.

Thanks for visiting!

Jim

Amazon Disclaimer: As an Amazon Associate I earn from qualifying purchases. FTC Disclosure: I get commissions for purchases made through links in this post. © 2026. All rights reserved.
